target: 4. Happy Birthday
I don't see the other one around. But this isn't a situation we can be optimistic about. We should hurry and get down the mountain.
Hunter, I'm sorry to ask, but could you come down the mountain with us?
My brother is badly injured, and I need all the help I can get.
That really is a terrible injury…
I'll get you to a hospital right away, so just hang in there a little longer.
Thank you.
…Thank goodness, Ryunosuke. Well, let's get going.
Y-Yeah…
Take it slow. Here, lean on my shoulder.
Th-Thanks…
You're really unsteady on your feet…
I-I'm fine.
…Alright. If it's too much, tell me right away.
…Yeah.
Um… Mr. Hunter, was it? Thank you for saving us…
It's Nezu. Save your thanks for later. For now, just focus on your own body.
…Okay.
(Ryunosuke-san...)
—So that means the boy wasn't attacked by the monster from just now, but by something else?
By that one wearing the red kimono.
That's right.
(A monster in a red kimono…)
(Nagumo-sensei is probably still confused about Ryunosuke's situation, so…)
(She probably can't say anything more than that right now.)
*Pant… pant…*
Ryunosuke-san… looks like he's in a lot of pain.
…He's lost too much blood.
Onee-chan…
What is it, Ryunosuke?
I'm… gonna rest here a little longer.
You guys… go on ahead.
What kind of stupid thing are you saying?!
But…
Here… stand up. I'll carry you on my back.
N-No… I'm really fine, so—
Ugaah!!!!
Is it hurting that badly? Let me take a look at your body.
…Who did this first aid?
I did.
It's too loose to stop the bleeding. I'm redoing it.
…Please do.
Keep an eye on the surroundings so we don't get spotted by any more weird things.
Understood. Please take care of Ryunosuke.
Guh… Aagh…!
Endure it. I know it hurts, but it won't stop the bleeding unless I tie it tight.
I wonder if Ryunosuke-san will be okay.
Honestly… it's hard to say.
(Nagumo-sensei has been deep in thought about something for a while now, but—)
Straw, are you still nearby?
(Is she talking to us?)
Well, either is fine. I'm going to sort through some things now, so if you're there, listen.
I want to get Ryunosuke to town safely and as quickly as possible.
But… what should I do—
Hey, what should I do?!
Anything is fine! If it's something that will help my brother, please tell me!
"I don't know."
"I'll support you as much as I can."
"Please just hurry."
That… I don't know… either.
You don't know… including Ryunosuke's future condition?
I'll support you as much as I can. That's all I can say right now.
Only… 'as much as you can'?
Right now… please just hurry.
If you escape to the town… to the hospital, I don't think they'll chase you anymore.
Assuming we make it safely to the hospital… will Ryunosuke be saved?
No… I don't know that much—
You don't know, huh.
Y-Yeah…
I see…
Thank you. I feel like I understand a bit better now.
You… no, you guys seem to have information you can give answers to, and information you can't.
Huh…?
There's two of you, right? Most of the voices I hear are male, but occasionally there's a female voice mixed in.
You're always by our side, but for some reason, we can't see you.
But you're watching us properly, and delivering information to us through your voices, right?
Y-Yes, that's right.
What made me realize that was Haine.
Both Ryunosuke and I received your warnings, and as a result, we were able to escape.
Even I couldn't have predicted… that Haine would turn out like that.
Nagumo-sensei…
And you guys know about me and Ryunosuke… no, not just that.
It seems you weren't completely unaware of the hunter named Nezu, either.
But you're not gods. There are things you know and can tell us, and things you can't.
Are you guys… time travelers?
If I think about it like that, the intention and timing of your warning that we would be "killed" makes perfect sense.
…First, there's a future where Ryunosuke is killed. You came from there. Isn't that right?
And you guys interfered with the past using "only your voices" to avoid that future—
And sure enough, we survived that situation.
But from here on out, these are events that couldn't have existed in the past.
You probably can't predict what will happen from here, and you're starting to feel the limits of supporting us with just your voices, right?
…That's exactly right.
Wow… even back then, she was exactly like the current Hizuru-san.
Yeah, her <color=#GF_TIPS_105>deductive reasoning</color> is as sharp as ever.
I'm grateful that my brother didn't die back there. Thank you…
Nagumo-sensei…
But no one knows what kind of impact interfering with the past will have on the future. While there might be good things—
Huh…?
Hey, I'm done stopping the bleeding.
*Pant… pant…*
Thank you. But Ryunosuke's condition is…
Ryunosuke-san?!
(He's severely weakened! From here to the hospital… will we make it in time?!)
Ryunosuke…
Onee-chan… I…
You don't have to force yourself to talk.
There's something… I want to apologize to you for, Onee-chan.
What is it… at a time like this.
It's because… it's a time like this.
When I heard you made a friend… I made fun of you… I'm sorry.
Also… I looked at your novel notebook… without permission… I'm sorry.
You… why are you bringing that up now…
And… last week… I borrowed your dictionary without asking… I'm sorry.
Also…
That's enough. That's enough, so…
If you've got that much energy, we're hurrying on.
Wait a second… I still haven't said… the most important thing.
The most important thing?
Onee-chan… Happy birthday…
Ah…
That's right. Thank you. But if that's the case…
Happy birthday, Ryunosuke.
Yeah… thank you.
Now we're even.
Hehe, I guess… we are…
Ryu… Ryunosuke…?
Ryunosuke!!!
He's just lost consciousness. But if he stays like this…
No… I absolutely don't want that.
Then we just have to do what we can. I'll carry the boy. We're hurrying to the hospital.
Yes…!
I won't let… our birthday become my brother's death anniversary.
Nagumo-sensei…
Nagumo-sensei hasn't given up yet. And of course, neither have I!
Yeah, me neither!
Ushio, let's go ahead and check if the route to the hospital is safe!
Yeah!
